revision.comment: Sync from repo need_translation/ [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:扶風]]
'''Fufeng''' (扶風)
* {{ill|Fufeng (region)|en|Fufeng (region)|qid=Q10916260|lt=Youfufeng|1=Fufeng (region)}} - An administrative division under the {{ill|Han dynasty|ja|漢朝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Han dynasty|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 漢|1=Han dynasty|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q7209}}. * {{ill|Fufeng Commandery|ja|扶風郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fufeng Commandery|1=Fufeng Commandery|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11497308}} - A historical commandery in China. * {{ill|Fufeng County|en|Fufeng County|qid=Q1339481|lt=Fufeng County|1=Fufeng County}} - A county in {{ill|Baoji|en|Baoji|qid=Q514796|lt=Baoji|1=Baoji}}, {{ill|Shaanxi|en|Shaanxi|qid=Q47974|lt=Shaanxi Province|1=Shaanxi}}, {{ill|China|en|China|qid=Q148|lt=People's Republic of China|1=China}}. {{translated page|ja|扶風|version=66777456|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:扶風]]
[[en:Fufeng]]
<!--Fufeng--><!--Fufeng-->
<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> {{disambiguation}} {{wikidata link|Q23997315}} [[Category:Place name disambiguation pages]] [[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata no English label]]
